# Stewart Light Calculator

Repository: https://github.com/reblocke/stewart-light
Purpose: Visualization for Stewart-Light acid-base approach
Status: No manuscript version is expected. Code and teaching examples are repository-authored unless otherwise noted.

## Human-Readable Entry Points
- `README.md` is the primary human-facing overview.
- `llms.txt` is a compact machine-readable index and should not replace the README.

## Repository Layout
- `.editorconfig`
- `.python-version`
- `AGENTS.md`
- `LICENSE`
- `Makefile`
- `README.md`
- `docs/CLINICAL_SCOPE.md`
- `docs/DECISIONS.md`
- `docs/DEPLOYMENT.md`
- `docs/PRIVACY.md`
- `docs/PUBLIC_COPY.md`
- `docs/REFERENCES.md`
- `docs/VALIDATION.md`
- `pyproject.toml`

## Data and Reuse Boundaries
No clinical data expected

## Workflow
Run Python smoke checks

## Dependencies
Python dependency metadata

## Citation
No publication DOI is assigned to this repository. Cite the GitHub repository URL and the commit or release used.

## License
MIT License for repository code; see `LICENSE`. Third-party and publisher materials remain under their original terms.

## Agent Cautions
- Do not re-add a README appendix aimed primarily at LLMs; integrate user-facing details into normal README sections.
- Keep restricted clinical data, private drafts, publisher PDFs, local paths, and generated outputs out of public documentation unless explicitly reviewed.
- Prefer concise summaries plus links to citable records over copied manuscript or publisher text.
